amount.description: Represents the total amount of the payment transaction, which includes the cost of the purchased items or services but excludes any additional fees or charges

currency_code.description:
The specified currency represents the denomination of the transaction.Nevertheless, it doesn't necessarily mandate payment in this exact currency.Due to potential currency conversions or exchanges, the final charge may be in a different currency.

username.description: Required. 150 characters or fewer. Letters, digits and @/./+/-/_ only.

is_superuser.title: Superuser status
is_superuser.description: Designates that this user has all permissions without explicitly assigning them.

is_staff.title: Staff status
is_staff.description: Designates whether the user can log into this admin site.

customer_email.description: The email address of the customer that is used to send payment notifications and receipts, and can be used for fraud prevention. This field is mandatory and is always sent to the payment gateway. It may also be included in the invoice, receipt, email, and displayed on the payment page.

amount.description: Represents the total amount of the payment transaction, which includes the cost of the purchased items or services but excludes any additional fees or charges

gateway_code.description: Represents the payment gateway code that was used to perform the payment or authorization.

language.description:
This field specifies the language to be used for communication with the customer, including the payment page, receipt, invoice, email, SMS, and any other communications related to the payment transaction.

* `en` - English
* `ar` - Arabic

customer_email.description: The email address of the customer that is used to send payment notifications and receipts, and can be used for fraud prevention. This field is mandatory and is always sent to the payment gateway. It may also be included in the invoice, receipt, email, and displayed on the payment page.

vendor_name.description: The name of the vendor or merchant associated with this payment. This field may be used for accounting and reporting purposes.

username.description: Required. 150 characters or fewer. Letters, digits and @/./+/-/_ only.

is_superuser.title: Superuser status
is_superuser.description: Designates that this user has all permissions without explicitly assigning them.

is_staff.title: Staff status
is_staff.description: Designates whether the user can log into this admin site.

type.description:
The type of the payment transaction. This field represents the purpose of the payment and can be one of several pre-defined choices.

* `e_commerce` - E-Commerce
* `payment_request` - Payment request
* `bulk` - Bulk Payment Request
* `catalogue` - Catalogue purchase
* `customer_payment` - Customer payment
* `event` - Event management and booking
* `food_ordering` - Food ordering
* `iata` - IATA
* `real_estate` - Real Estate

* `e_commerce` - E-Commerce

* `customer_payment` - Customer payment
* `event` - Event management and booking
* `food_ordering` - Food ordering
* `iata` - IATA
* `real_estate` - Real Estate
